name: Auto - Smart Default (Recommended)
description: Uses smart defaults based on operator. Missing field for 'equals []' check becomes true
author: securecheck

metadata.comment: Without Helius: checks authority_changes AND treats missing identity as unknown (true)

name: Fail - Conservative (Requires Data)
description: Rule fails if Helius unavailable - conservative approach for whitelist rules
author: securecheck

metadata.comment: Without Helius: always fails (can't verify it's a DEX, so block)

name: Pass - Permissive (Innocent Until Proven)
description: Rule passes if Helius unavailable - permissive for blacklist rules
author: securecheck

metadata.comment: Without Helius: always passes (can't confirm scammer, so allow through)

name: Error - Strict Mode (Require Analyzer)
description: Throws error if OtterSec unavailable - for critical verification requirements
author: securecheck

metadata.comment: Without OtterSec: scan fails with error (strict enforcement)

name: Compound Conditions with Override
description: Override applies to entire rule, affecting all conditions
author: securecheck

metadata.comment: Without Helius: helius_identity check fails, but other conditions still evaluate. All must pass.

name: Any Conditions - Fallback Detection
description: Use 'any' logic for fallback when analyzer unavailable
author: securecheck

rule.message: High risk detected via multiple signals

metadata.comment: Without Helius: first two conditions fail (can't contain), falls back to risk_score check
